overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through an abandoned urban area in Night City. The journey begins in a dark concrete underpass, emerges into a sunlit derelict plaza beneath highway overpasses, passes burning debris and futuristic megastructures, and ends at a street vendor stall with neon signage surrounded by NPCs.

events.description: approaching tunnel exit, bright daylight becomes visible ahead
exits dark tunnel into covered highway underpass area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark concrete tunnel toward the exit

entered.detail: rough gray concrete walls of the pedestrian tunnel
exposed concrete ceiling beams with rectangular patterns
wall covered with colorful graffiti tags and street art
metal safety railing along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, enclosed concrete pedestrian tunnel with graffiti-covered walls. The player walks forward toward a bright exit, transitioning from the dimly lit interior to a covered underpass area with visible daylight ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with debris and abandoned vehicles

events.description: passing burning barrel with active flames and smoke
moving from shadow of overpass into direct sunlight
turning right to follow path alongside overpass wall

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive concrete highway overpass past burning debris and abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with visible support beams
metal barrel with active fire burning inside
abandoned rusted vehicle parked under the overpass
scattered concrete rubble and broken tiles on the ground
large futuristic curved building with glass facade in the distance
tall palm trees visible against the sky
dark smoke rising from fires in the distant city

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the tunnel into a semi-covered highway underpass, passing a burning barrel and abandoned vehicle. The scene transitions from shadow to bright sunlight as the player turns right, revealing a massive curved megabuilding and palm trees in the distance with smoke rising from the city beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict commercial street with overgrown vegetation

events.description: passing abandoned building with active fire burning on upper balcony
approaching street vendor stall with glowing blue neon hologram sign

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path past derelict buildings toward a street vendor stall

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the entrance of the abandoned building

entered.detail: multi-story concrete office building with broken windows and decay
active flames burning on the upper balcony of the building
tall construction cranes silhouetted against the sky
small makeshift vendor structure with tarp roof
dry grass and bushes growing through cracks in the pavement

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open derelict plaza with overgrown vegetation, the player passes an abandoned office building with fire burning on its upper balcony. Construction cranes are visible in the distance against the bright sky as the player approaches a street vendor stall with a glowing blue neon sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor stall with neon signage and construction scaffolding

events.description: arriving at vendor stall where three NPCs are gathered around the counter
moving past vendor stall into area with orange construction scaffolding

agents.ego_description: approaching the vendor stall to observe the NPCs and surroundings, then examining the scaffolding

notable_agents.action: sitting on a worn couch at the vendor stall
standing at the vendor counter wearing distinctive purple headgear

entered.detail: bright blue glowing holographic sign with Asian characters above the stall
stacked wooden crates and boxes in front of the vendor stall
tall orange metal construction scaffolding with platforms
metal chain link fence attached to the scaffolding structure
stacked concrete cinder blocks on wooden pallets

segments.scene_description: The player arrives at a street vendor stall with a bright blue neon hologram sign where several NPCs are gathered. After observing the scene, the player moves past the stall into a construction area featuring extensive orange scaffolding, chain link fencing, and stacked concrete blocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic concrete tunnel into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban wasteland. It begins in a dimly lit pedestrian tunnel with graffiti-covered walls, moving forward toward a bright exit that leads into a semi-covered highway underpass. As the camera emerges from the shadows into bright sunlight, it passes a burning barrel and an abandoned vehicle before turning right to reveal a massive curved megabuilding and distant palm trees amidst rising smoke. The scene then opens into a derelict plaza with overgrown vegetation and a burning office balcony, moving past distant construction cranes toward a street vendor stall marked by a glowing blue neon hologram. Finally, the camera glides past the gathered NPCs at the stall and enters a construction zone defined by orange scaffolding, chain link fencing, and stacked concrete blocks.
